docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PRESS, ELLEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25.00) SERVED SEP-16-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PRESS, ELLEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,940.00 FILED BY HONG, VIOLETTE AS TO DEFENDANT PRESS, ELLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2011 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO NOV-07-2011 AT 5:30 PM DEPT.#506. - PER JUDGE PRO TEM ROBERT J. SHEPARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-07-2011 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HONG, VIOLETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRESS, ELLEN $663.10 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $738.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST IS GRANTED. - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL - FILED BY DEFENDANT PRESS, ELLEN
